item.title: VERO MODA Vmverodona LS Jacket Noos Abrigo Gris Light Grey Melange Light Grey Melange 36 Talla del Fabricante: X-Small para Mujer
item.description: Está VERO MODA Vmverodona LS Jacket Noos Abrigo Gris Light Grey Melange Light Grey Melange 36 Talla del Fabricante: X-Small para Mujer en el siguiente enlace! ℹ️: Cleaner chic with a slightly tailored fit and two front pockets With a Large hood for more comfort on COOL Days 🛒 Ver la oferta!!
